Notice Of Application And Application To Stay Pending Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support, And Declaration Of Counsel In Support
Off Calendar Nov-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF GECH, INC.'s Application To Stay Pending Arbitration is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The Court signed the order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
